source: Google Business Profile — Cottage Aesthetics, Hartlebury
captured_via: headed browser (Google Maps), for design demo only — do NOT publish without client permission

reviews.author: Bev Dare
reviews.text: I visited Cottage Aesthetics yesterday for Jalupro Super Hydro Skin Boosters with Purdi and once again had a fantastic experience. Her clinic was as welcoming and as beautiful and spotless as ever.

reviews.author: Sophie Vale
reviews.text: I had such a positive experience with Purdi. I accidentally arrived a day early for my appointment and she still managed to fit me in, which I really appreciated and says a lot about her care for her clients.

reviews.author: Lucy Carr
reviews.text: I had skin booster treatments and botox at Cottage Aesthetics and couldn't be more impressed. Everything was explained so clearly, including the science behind the treatment, which made me feel completely informed and confident.

reviews.author: Taylor Jordan
reviews.text: I recently had Botox treatment at Cottage Aesthetics, and I couldn't be happier with the results! The whole experience was professional, friendly, and relaxing from start to finish. Purdi took her time to explain everything clearly.

reviews.author: Lucy Hayward
reviews.text: I recently visited Cottage Aesthetics for my first time having lip filler. I was initially quite worried but Purdi literally spent ages with me discussing what I want to achieve and any concerns I had. She really put me at ease.

reviews.author: Jennifer Skeffington
reviews.text: I visited Purdi's Cottage Aesthetics recently for the first time and I had the best experience. I felt truly listened to for the first time in my Botox journey; she is incredibly warm and welcoming, knowledgeable and tailors your treatment to you.

reviews.author: Laura Lewis
reviews.text: I had a wonderful experience at Cottage Aesthetics. From the moment I arrived, I felt completely at ease. She is a truly lovely person — warm, reassuring, and clearly very talented.

reviews.author: Ella Simmance
reviews.text: I had the loveliest experience today at Cottage Aesthetics, getting my first microneedling treatment. Purdi talked me through every step and what to expect and made me feel really comfortable and relaxed.

reviews.author: Emma Collins
reviews.text: Purdi has done a fantastic job for me. I've been to a couple of different places prior to seeing Purdi and they just weren't delivering the results I'd hoped for. Purdi listened to my frustrations and I'm thrilled with the impact she has made. Would recommend her in a heartbeat!
